summary.lv: Aerones Engineering, vēja turbīnu robotizēto apkopju pakalpojumu sniedzējs pasaulē (klienti — NextEra, GE, Vestas, Enel, Siemens Gamesa), meklē vecāko Python inženieri Rīgas komandai.
summary.en: Aerones Engineering — the world's leading provider of robotic wind-turbine maintenance (customers include NextEra, GE, Vestas, Enel, Siemens Gamesa) — is hiring a Senior Python Engineer for its Riga team.
